Pay","details":"Holds funds for a single escrow deal. Requires 2 of 3 participant      signatures (buyer, seller, arbiter) to withdraw funds.      Signatures are collected by the escrow contract during the deal      lifecycle and cryptographically verified here at withdrawal time.      The recipient and fee structure are determined by the escrow state:      - COMPLETE: seller receives funds minus 1% fee      - REFUNDED/CANCELED: buyer receives full refund (no fee)","events":{"Withdrawn(uint256,address,uint256,address,uint256)":{"params":{"escrowId":"The escrow ID","feeAmount":"Fee amount (0 for refunds)","feeReceiver":"Address receiving the fee (address(0) if no fee)","netAmount":"Amount sent to recipient","recipient":"The address receiving the funds"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()":{"returns":{"_0":"The domain separator"}},"constructor":{"params":{"_escrowContract":"The escrow contract address","_escrowId":"The escrow ID this wallet belongs balance"}},"getValidSignatureCount()":{"returns":{"count":"Number of valid signatures (0-3)"}},"isSignatureValid(address)":{"params":{"participant":"The participant to check"},"returns":{"_0":"True if the participant's signature is valid"}},"withdraw()":{"details":"Requires:      - Escrow state is COMPLETE, REFUNDED, or CANCELED      - At least 2 of 3 valid participant signatures      - Called by a (100 basis points)"},"INITIAL_CHAIN_ID":{"details":"Chain ID at deployment for domain separator validation"},"INITIAL_DOMAIN_SEPARATOR":{"details":"Cached domain separator for gas params._escrowId: The escrow ID this wallet belongs to

returns._0: True if the participant's signature is valid

withdraw().details: Requires:      - Escrow state is COMPLETE, REFUNDED, or CANCELED      - At least 2 of 3 valid participant signatures      - Called by a participant (buyer, seller, or arbiter)      For COMPLETE: seller receives amount minus 1% fee      For REFUNDED/CANCELED: buyer receives full amount

ESCROW_CONTRACT().notice: The escrow contract that controls this wallet

ESCROW_ID().notice: The escrow ID this wallet belongs to

getAuthorizationDigest(address).notice: Returns the digest a participant should sign

getBalance().notice: Returns the current token balance in the wallet

getValidSignatureCount().notice: Returns the number of valid signatures currently stored

isSignatureValid(address).notice: Checks if a participant's stored signature is valid
